channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Krebs on Security, The Hacker News, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading

item.title: Agentic GRC: Teams Get the Tech. The Mindset Shift Is What's Missing.
item.description: Agentic GRC automates workflows, forcing teams to rethink their role beyond operations. Anecdotes explains why the biggest challenge is shifting from execution to risk leadership. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Open VSX Bug Let Malicious VS Code Extensions Bypass Pre-Publish Security Checks
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a now-patched bug impacting Open VSX's pre-publish scanning pipeline to cause the tool to allow a malicious Microsoft Visual Studio Code (VS Code) e...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: European Commission investigating breach after Amazon cloud hack
item.description: The European Commission, the European Union's main executive body, is investigating a security breach after a threat actor gained access to its Amazon cloud infrastructure. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: AitM Phishing Targets TikTok Business Accounts Using Cloudflare Turnstile Evasion
item.description: Threat actors are using adversary-in-the-middle (AitM) phishing pages to seize control of TikTok for Business accounts in a new campaign, according to a report from Push Security. Business accounts as...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: We Are At War
item.description: Rising geopolitical tensions are reflected (or in some cases preceded) by cyber operations, while technology itself has become politicized. Let’s admit it: we are in the middle of it. Introduction: O...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Anti-piracy coalition takes down AnimePlay app with 5 million users
item.description: The Alliance for Creativity and Entertainment (ACE) announced the shutdown of AnimePlay, a major anime streaming platform with over 5 million users. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Bearlyfy Hits Russian Firms with Custom GenieLocker Ransomware
item.description: A pro-Ukrainian group called Bearlyfy has been attributed to more than 70 cyber attacks targeting Russian companies since it first surfaced in the threat landscape in January 2025, with recent attacks...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Windows 11 KB5079391 update rolls out Smart App Control improvements
item.description: ​Microsoft has released the KB5079391 preview cumulative update for Windows 11 24H2 and 25H2, which includes 29 changes, such as Smart App Control and Display improvements. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Dutch Police discloses security breach after phishing attack
item.description: The Dutch National Police (Politie) says a security breach resulting from a successful phishing attack has had a limited impact and hasn't affected citizens' data. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: LangChain, LangGraph Flaws Expose Files, Secrets, Databases in Widely Used AI Frameworks
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed three security vulnerabilities impacting LangChain and LangGraph that, if successfully exploited, could expose filesystem data, environment secrets, and conver...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Ajax football club hack exposed fan data, enabled ticket hijack
item.description: Dutch professional football club Ajax Amsterdam (AFC Ajax) disclosed that a hacker exploited vulnerabilities in its IT systems and accessed data belonging to a few hundred people. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: CISA: New Langflow flaw actively exploited to hijack AI workflows
item.description: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) is warning that hackers are actively exploiting a critical vulnerability identified as CVE-2026-33017, which affects the Langflow framework ...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: China-Linked Red Menshen Uses Stealthy BPFDoor Implants to Spy via Telecom Networks
item.description: A long-term and ongoing campaign attributed to a China-nexus threat actor has embedded itself in telecom networks to conduct espionage against government networks. The strategic positioning activity, ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: UK sanctions Xinbi marketplace linked to Asian scam centers
item.description: The United Kingdom's Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office (FCDO) has sanctioned Xinbi, a Chinese-language cryptocurrency-based online marketplace that sells stolen data and satellite internet ...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: TikTok for Business accounts targeted in new phishing campaign
item.description: Threat actors are targeting TikTok for Business accounts in a phishing campaign that prevents security bots from analyzing malicious pages. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: WhatsApp rolls out more AI features, iOS multi-account support
item.description: WhatsApp is rolling out multiple features designed to make the app easier to use, including AI-powered message replies and photo retouching, support for two accounts on iOS, and chat history transfer ...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Inside a Modern Fraud Attack: From Bot Signups to Account Takeovers
item.description: Multi-stage fraud attacks chain bots, proxies, and stolen credentials from signup to takeover. IPQS shows why correlating IP, device, identity, and behavior is critical to stop it. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: [Webinar] Stop Guessing. Learn to Validate Your Defenses Against Real Attacks
item.description: Most teams have security tools in place. Alerts are firing, dashboards look clean, threat intel is flowing in. On the surface, everything feels under control. But one question usually stays unanswered...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Claude Extension Flaw Enabled Zero-Click XSS Prompt Injection via Any Website
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a vulnerability in Anthropic's Claude Google Chrome Extension that could have been exploited to trigger malicious prompts simply by visiting a web page. The fl...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Coruna iOS exploit framework linked to Triangulation attacks
item.description: The Coruna exploit kit is an evolution of the framework used in the Operation Triangulation espionage campaign, which in 2023 targeted iPhones via zero-click iMessage exploits. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Russia arrests suspected owner of LeakBase cybercrime forum
item.description: Russian police arrested a Taganrog resident believed to be the owner of LeakBase, a major online forum used by cybercriminals to buy and sell stolen data and hacking tools. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Masters of Imitation: How Hackers and Art Forgers Perfect the Art of Deception
item.description: Unmasking impostors is something the art world has faced for decades, and there are valuable lessons from the works of Elmyr de Hory that can apply to the world of defensive cybersecurity. During the ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Suspected RedLine infostealer malware admin extradited to US
item.description: An Armenian suspect was extradited to the United States to face criminal charges for allegedly helping manage RedLine, one of the most prolific infostealer malware operations in recent years. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: PQC Push, AI Vuln Hunting, Pirated Traps, Phishing Kits & 20 More Stories
item.description: Some weeks in security feel loud. This one feels sneaky. Less big dramatic fireworks, more of that slow creeping sense that too many people are getting way too comfortable abusing things they probably...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Coruna iOS Kit Reuses 2023 Triangulation Exploit Code in Recent Mass Attacks
item.description: The kernel exploit for two security vulnerabilities used in the recently uncovered Apple iOS exploit kit known as Coruna is an updated version of the same exploit that was used in the Operation Triang...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: WebRTC Skimmer Bypasses CSP to Steal Payment Data from E-Commerce Sites
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a new payment skimmer that uses WebRTC data channels as a means to receive payloads and exfiltrate data, effectively bypassing security controls. "Instead of ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: GitHub adds AI-powered bug detection to expand security coverage
item.description: GitHub is adopting AI-based scanning for its Code Security tool to expand vulnerability detections beyond the CodeQL static analysis and cover more languages and frameworks. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: LeakBase Admin Arrested in Russia Over Massive Stolen Credential Marketplace
item.description: The alleged administrator of the LeakBase cybercrime forum has been arrested by Russian law enforcement authorities, state media reported Thursday. According to TASS and MVD Media, a news website link...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: GlassWorm Malware Uses Solana Dead Drops to Deliver RAT and Steal Browser, Crypto Data
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a new evolution of the GlassWorm campaign that delivers a multi-stage framework capable of comprehensive data theft and installing a remote access trojan (RAT), ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: The Kill Chain Is Obsolete When Your AI Agent Is the Threat
item.description: In September 2025, Anthropic disclosed that a state-sponsored threat actor used an AI coding agent to execute an autonomous cyber espionage campaign against 30 global targets. The AI handled 80-90% of...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News
